features.title: Measurable rebuild around the Harness Scorecard
acceptance: rubric.json is the single source for web quiz and CLI
harness-score CLI with tests; repo dogfoods at 100/100
Interactive /diagnose scorecard renders and links to lessons
Curriculum reorganized by the five pillars (F/P/O)
Mermaid diagrams render; docs:build and npm test are green in CI

features.title: Publish harness-score to npm for npx usage
acceptance: Package published so `npx harness-score .` works for anyone
Docs updated to lead with the npx one-liner
